appliedUpdates.description: Documented that Tauri `app.path().home_dir()` follows the launched process `HOME`, so validators can isolate both scan roots and the `~/.skillsmanage/` database by starting `pnpm tauri dev` with a fixture HOME.
Updated native-window guidance to prefer macOS `screencapture` for evidence because Quartz `CGWindowListCreateImage(...)` can skew screenshots of this Tauri app.
